monday.question: What does 'shy' mean?
What does 'outgoing' mean?
What does 'friendly' mean?
What does 'personality' mean?
What does 'appearance' mean?
What does 'smart' mean?
What does 'kind' mean?
Which adjective describes someone who talks easily with new people?
Which adjective describes someone's physical appearance (not personality)?
What is the OPPOSITE of 'shy'?
Complete: 'She is very _____ and loves meeting new people.' (extrovertida)
Complete: 'He is _____, so he doesn't talk much in class.' (tímido)
Complete: 'My neighbor is very _____. She always says hello.' (simpática)
Complete: 'He is very _____. He always helps others.' (gentil)
Complete: 'She _____ like her mother — same eyes and smile.' (parece fisicamente)
Translate to English: 'Ela é alta e simpática.'
Translate to English: 'Ele é tímido, mas muito inteligente.'
monday.correctAnswer: he is shy but very smart

monday.question: Translate to English: 'Meu amigo é muito simpático.'
Translate to English: 'Ela tem uma personalidade incrível.'
Translate to English: 'Ele parece o pai — alto e de cabelo escuro.'
monday.correctAnswer: he looks like his father — tall and dark-haired|he looks like his dad — tall with dark hair

tuesday.question: How do we form the comparative of short one-syllable adjectives like 'tall'?
Which is the correct comparative of 'tall'?
Which is the correct comparative of 'smart'?
How do we form the comparative of longer adjectives like 'outgoing'?
Which is the correct comparative of 'friendly'?
Which sentence is correct?
options: She is more tall than her sister.
She is tallest than her sister.
She is taller than her sister.
She is tall than her sister.
tuesday.correctAnswer: She is taller than her sister.

tuesday.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: He is more outgoing that his brother.
He is more outgoing than his brother.
He is outrgoing than his brother.
He is outgoingest than his brother.
tuesday.correctAnswer: He is more outgoing than his brother.

tuesday.question: Complete: 'She is _____ than her sister.' (tall → comparative)
Complete: 'He is _____ than his classmate.' (smart → comparative)
Complete: 'My brother is _____ than me.' (young → comparative)
Complete: 'She is _____ outgoing than her coworker.' (comparative marker for long adj.)
Complete: 'He is _____ patient than I expected.' (comparative — long adj.)
Complete: 'She is _____ kind than she looks.' (comparative — short adj.)
Complete: 'He is taller _____ his father.' (comparison word)
Translate to English: 'Ela é mais alta do que eu.'
tuesday.correctAnswer: she is taller than me|she is taller than i am

tuesday.question: Translate to English: 'Ele é mais inteligente do que o amigo dele.'
tuesday.correctAnswer: he is smarter than his friend

tuesday.question: Translate to English: 'Minha irmã é mais simpática do que meu irmão.'
tuesday.correctAnswer: my sister is friendlier than my brother|my sister is more friendly than my brother

tuesday.question: Translate to English: 'Ele é mais tímido do que parece.'
tuesday.correctAnswer: he is shyer than he looks|he is more shy than he looks

tuesday.question: Translate to English: 'João é mais alto do que Pedro.'
tuesday.correctAnswer: João is taller than Pedro|Joao is taller than Pedro

tuesday.question: Translate to English: 'Ela é mais extrovertida do que a irmã.'
tuesday.correctAnswer: she is more outgoing than her sister

wednesday.question: What does 'She looks like her mother' mean?
options: Ela tem a aparência física da mãe.
wednesday.correctAnswer: Ela tem a aparência física da mãe.

wednesday.question: What does 'He is like his father' mean?
options: Ele se parece fisicamente com o pai.
Ele é igual ao pai em personalidade/comportamento.
wednesday.correctAnswer: Ele é igual ao pai em personalidade/comportamento.

wednesday.question: Which sentence means 'Ela se parece com a irmã' (aparência física)?
wednesday.correctAnswer: She looks like her sister.

wednesday.question: Which sentence means 'Ele é como o irmão — muito engraçado'?
options: He looks like his brother — very funny.
He is like his brother — very funny.
He seems his brother — very funny.
He is looking like his brother — very funny.
wednesday.correctAnswer: He is like his brother — very funny.

wednesday.question: What is the irregular comparative of 'good'?
wednesday.correctAnswer: Better

wednesday.question: What is the irregular comparative of 'bad'?
wednesday.correctAnswer: Worse

wednesday.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: She is more better at English than me.
She is gooder at English than me.
She is better at English than me.
She is best at English than me.
wednesday.correctAnswer: She is better at English than me.

wednesday.question: Complete: 'She _____ like her grandmother — same smile and eyes.' (looks like)
wednesday.correctAnswer: looks

wednesday.question: Complete: 'He is _____ his older brother — very confident and funny.' (is like)
wednesday.correctAnswer: like

wednesday.question: Complete: 'She is _____ at sports than her twin sister.' (better — irregular comparative)
wednesday.correctAnswer: better

wednesday.question: Complete: 'My old phone was _____ than this one.' (worse — irregular comparative)
wednesday.correctAnswer: worse

wednesday.question: Complete: 'He is more _____ than his coworkers — he never gets angry.' (patient)
wednesday.correctAnswer: patient

wednesday.question: Complete: 'She is more _____ than anyone in the class.' (creative)
wednesday.correctAnswer: creative

wednesday.question: Translate to English: 'Ele se parece com o pai.'
wednesday.correctAnswer: he looks like his father|he looks like his dad

wednesday.question: Translate to English: 'Ela é como a mãe — muito paciente.'
wednesday.correctAnswer: she is like her mother — very patient|she is like her mom — very patient

wednesday.question: Translate to English: 'Minha amiga parece uma modelo.'
wednesday.correctAnswer: my friend looks like a model

wednesday.question: Translate to English: 'Ele é melhor em inglês do que eu.'
wednesday.correctAnswer: he is better at english than me|he is better at english than i am

wednesday.question: Translate to English: 'Ela é mais criativa do que qualquer um da turma.'
wednesday.correctAnswer: she is more creative than anyone in the class

wednesday.question: Translate to English: 'Esse filme foi pior do que o último.'
wednesday.correctAnswer: this movie was worse than the last one|this film was worse than the last one

wednesday.question: Translate to English: 'Ela parece mais nova do que realmente é.'
wednesday.correctAnswer: she looks younger than she really is|she looks younger than she actually is

thursday.question: Which adjective describes PERSONALITY (not appearance)?
Which adjective describes APPEARANCE (not personality)?
What does 'confident' mean?
What does 'patient' mean?
Which question asks about someone's APPEARANCE?
Which question asks about someone's PERSONALITY?
Which sentence correctly uses a comparative adjective?
options: She is more taller than her friend.
She is more tall than her friend.
She is taller than her friend.
She is tallest than her friend.
thursday.correctAnswer: She is taller than her friend.

thursday.question: Which sentence correctly combines appearance and personality?
options: He is tall and he more outgoing.
He is tall and more outgoing than his brother.
He is taller and more outgoinger than his brother.
He is more tall and outgoing than his brother.
thursday.correctAnswer: He is tall and more outgoing than his brother.

thursday.question: Complete: 'Maria is _____ than Ana, but Ana is more outgoing.' (tall → comparative)
Complete: 'He is very _____. He never gets angry or raises his voice.' (patient)
Complete: 'She is really _____. She makes everyone laugh.' (funny)
Complete: '— What does he look like? — He is _____ and has dark hair.' (tall)
Complete: '— What is she like? — She is very _____ and always helps people.' (kind)
Complete: 'He _____ like his grandfather — same nose and eyes.' (looks like)
Complete: 'She is more _____ than her sister when it comes to art.' (creative)
Translate to English: 'Meu professor é alto, simpático e muito paciente.'
thursday.correctAnswer: my teacher is tall, friendly and very patient

thursday.question: Translate to English: 'Ele é mais extrovertido do que eu.'
thursday.correctAnswer: he is more outgoing than me|he is more outgoing than i am

thursday.question: Translate to English: 'Ela tem cabelo liso e é muito simpática.'
thursday.correctAnswer: she has straight hair and is very friendly

thursday.question: Translate to English: 'Ela é confiante e muito inteligente.'
thursday.correctAnswer: she is confident and very smart|she is confident and very intelligent

thursday.question: Translate to English: 'Quem é mais alto, você ou seu irmão?'
thursday.correctAnswer: who is taller, you or your brother?

friday.question: What does 'creative' mean?
What does 'serious' mean?
Which sentence is correct?
options: She is more taller than him.
She is the taller than him.

friday.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: He is more funnier than his friend.
He is funniest than his friend.
He is funnier than his friend.
He is most funny than his friend.
friday.correctAnswer: He is funnier than his friend.

friday.question: What is 'good' in comparative form?
'What does she look like?' — Which answer is correct?
options: She is very kind and funny.
She looks like a model — tall with long hair.
friday.correctAnswer: She looks like a model — tall with long hair.

friday.question: 'What is he like?' — Which answer is correct?
options: He is tall and has brown eyes.
He is really outgoing and very funny.
friday.correctAnswer: He is really outgoing and very funny.

friday.question: Which describes someone's personality correctly?
options: She has curly hair and brown eyes.
She is kind, patient and very creative.
friday.correctAnswer: She is kind, patient and very creative.

friday.question: Complete: 'She is taller _____ her sister.' (comparison word)
Complete: 'He is _____ at sports than his twin.' (better — irregular)
Complete: 'She is very _____. She never says anything rude.' (kind)
Complete: 'My friend is _____ and always makes people feel welcome.' (friendly)
Complete: 'She _____ like a young version of her mother.' (looks like)
Complete: '— What does your boss look like? — He is _____ and has short hair.' (tall / short / etc.)
Complete: 'He is _____ serious than his sister — he laughs all the time.' (less — opposite comparison)
Translate to English: 'Ela é mais séria do que parece.'
friday.correctAnswer: she is more serious than she looks

friday.question: Translate to English: 'Você é mais extrovertido do que seu irmão?'
friday.correctAnswer: are you more outgoing than your brother?

friday.question: Translate to English: 'Ele parece mais velho do que realmente é.'
friday.correctAnswer: he looks older than he really is|he looks older than he actually is

friday.question: Translate to English: 'Quem é mais simpático na sua família?'
friday.correctAnswer: who is the friendliest in your family?|who is friendlier in your family?

friday.question: Translate to English: 'Meu melhor amigo é engraçado, criativo e muito gentil.'
friday.correctAnswer: my best friend is funny, creative and very kind
